name: pariprashna
description: Pariprashna (परिप्रश्न) - a community platform for authentic answers about Hinduism, Sanatan Dharma

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.dev: concurrently -n SERVER,CLIENT -c blue,magenta "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm start --prefix client"
